The agency added that one martyr was retrieved from beneath the rubble in #Tebnin, while two martyrs were retrieved from the targeted house in Shaqra.

In a post on X, #Iran’s Permanent Mission to the United Nations in New York argued that "Iran is not a party to the 1982 UN Convention on the Law of the Sea" and "therefore is not bound by its treaty-based provisions."

The mission emphasized that, "as the main coastal state encompassing much of the Strait of Hormuz, within whose territorial sea the Strait of Hormuz lies, Iran has the legitimate and legal right to take necessary and proportionate measures to address emerging security threats, ensure safe navigation, and prevent the misuse of the Strait of Hormuz for hostile or military purposes."

It further argued that any disruption to maritime transport in the #Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz would be the responsibility of the United States, citing "unlawful actions that endanger international navigation."

The statement concluded that "lasting stability and security in the Persian Gulf and wider region" depends on a "durable and permanent cessation of aggression against Iran, supplemented by credible guarantees of non-recurrence, and full respect for the legitimate sovereign rights and interests of Iran."

#IranWar #WarOnIran #StraitOfHormuz

Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon continue despite the ongoing temporary ceasefire agreement.

Al Mayadeen's correspondent in southern Lebanon reported today that an Israeli drone strike targeted a motorcycle in the town of Majdal Zoun. Another Israeli airstrike targeted the town of Jbal al-Batm.

According to our correspondent, an Israeli drone strike targeted an agricultural orchard in the area between al-Burj al-Shamali and al-Hosh.

The IOF also carried out airstrikes on the outskirts of Baraachit, while artillery units shelled the area between Baraachit and Shaqra, using phosphorus shells.

Later on, our correspondent reported that  Israeli airstrikes targeted Baraachit, Tebnine, and Shaqra. Israeli airstrikes also targeted the towns of Touline and Kherbet Selm.

Our correspondent reported that Israeli artillery shelling targeted the town of Buyout al-Sayyad. An Israeli aggression also targeted the town of Majdal Zoun, with another aggression reported on the town of Qabrikha. 

The Israeli occupation forces also issued a threat against 16 villages in South Lebanon, warning residents to move toward the Sidon district.

#LebanonUnderAttack #AlMayadeen #SouthLebanon

The United Arab Emirates announced on Tuesday that it has withdrawn from #OPEC and OPEC+, delivering a major blow to the oil-exporting alliances.

According to Reuters, the “significant loss of the UAE,” a long-time OPEC member, could lead to instability and weaken the group, which has traditionally aimed to present a united front despite internal disagreements over issues ranging from geopolitics to production quotas.

#Gulf producers within OPEC have already faced difficulties exporting through the Strait of Hormuz due to the US-Israeli war on Iran. 

The decision follows criticism from the UAE, a key regional business hub and one of Washington’s closest allies, of Arab states accusing them of failing to adequately protect it from repeated Iranian retaliation during the war.

At the Gulf Influencers Forum on Monday, Anwar Gargash, the diplomatic adviser for the UAE president, criticized the Arab and Gulf response to the Iranian retaliation strikes. 

"The Gulf Cooperation Council countries supported each other logistically, but politically and militarily, I think their position has been the weakest historically," Gargash said.

"I expect this weak stance from the Arab League and I am not surprised by it, but I haven't expected it from the (Gulf) Cooperation Council and I am surprised by it," he added.

#UAE #WestAsia #IranWar #StraitofHormuz

The Emergency Operations Center of Lebanon’s Public Health Ministry reported that Israeli airstrikes on South Lebanon on April 27, in violation of the ceasefire, killed four people, including a woman, and wounded 51 others, among them three children and six women.

The Ministry added that since March 2, the cumulative toll from the ongoing Israeli war on Lebanon has surged to 2,521 martyrs and 7,804 injured.

Today's intensified Israeli occupation forces' attacks across South Lebanon and the #Bekaa region were greenlit by the United States, which is officially positioned as a mediator in ceasefire negotiations, according to Maariv.

#LebanonUnderAttack #SouthLebanon #Lebanon

@IRIMFA_SPOX , porte-parole du ministère des Affaires étrangères, a réagi aux aveux des autorités judiciaires américaines concernant l’ordre de saisie de navires transportant du pétrole iranien et la confiscation de leur cargaison:

« Cela [l’émission d’un ordre de saisie et de confiscation de navires transportant du pétrole iranien] n’est rien d’autre que la légalisation officielle de la piraterie et du pillage armé dans les eaux internationales.

C’est un retour à l’ère où les pirates dominaient les mers ! À cette différence près qu’aujourd’hui, ils agissent avec une autorisation étatique, naviguent sous un pavillon officiel et appellent leur pillage “application de la loi”.

Les États-Unis doivent être pleinement tenus responsables de ce comportement honteux et de cette violation flagrante du droit ; un comportement qui constitue une atteinte sans précédent au droit international et au libre commerce, et qui menace les fondements essentiels de la sécurité maritime. »
